name: Strawberry Carrot Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease and flour a 12-cup bundt cake pan.
3. Beat all ingredients except strawberries and Strawberry Cream Cheese Glaze in a large bowl on low speed for 45 seconds, scraping the bowl constantly.
4. Beat on medium speed for 2 minutes, scraping occasionally.
5. Fold in the strawberries; pour into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 45 to 55 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool for 5 minutes; remove from the pan.
8. Cool completely on a wire rack.
9. Prepare Strawberry Cream Cheese Glaze; spoon onto cake.
10. Refrigerate any remaining cake.
